_comment: Seed components for the Quality of University Education composite.
Each row is upserted by `itemId` into the `education_quality_components`
MongoDB collection. The fetcher reads this collection on every cron run;
if the collection is empty/unreachable it falls back to the hardcoded
- update the JSON file and re-run `scripts/seed_education_components.py`
(or, in future, approve a news-watcher proposal in the admin queue).
- The next cron pass recomputes the composite score.
All three components are UK-wide and annually published.

components.name: Graduate Outcomes — high-skilled employment / further study
components.notes: UK-wide. Indicator: % of first-degree graduates in high-skilled employment, further study, or other positive outcome 15 months after graduation. Update annually when HESA publishes the next cohort release.

components.name: Continuation rate — first-year UGs progressing to year 2
components.notes: UK-wide. Indicator: % of UK-domiciled full-time first-degree entrants who continue into year 2 (1 − non-continuation rate). Old UKPI series was discontinued in 2020/21 and migrated into HESA core open data.

components.name: NSS — positive on 'Teaching on my course'
components.notes: UK-wide. 357,000+ final-year UGs surveyed, 71.5% response rate. Indicator: % giving the two most positive answers on the 'Teaching on my course' theme.
